rulings.Case Title: WALTER J RYBACZYK et al VS. AMERICAN STANDARD, INC. IND AND AS SUCCESSOR IN et al

rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY OCTOBER 4, 2006. DEFENDANT SUPRO CORP.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN. NO TIMELY RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY. NO SPECIFIC QUESTION AT DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT. =(302/AJR/PB)
